title: Galium cordatum
taxonomy: Galium cordatum is classified in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Galium and is a type of flowering plant. The species Galium cordatum is a member of the order Gentianales. The classification also includes the family level as being part of the clade Asterids. At the most basic level, it is a member of the kingdom Plantae.
uses: Galium cordatum is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. intro: Galium cordatum, also known as Heartleaf, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce fever.
